BookingPage.title: Book an appointment
BookingPage.allTimesInCyprusHint: All times in Cyprus · Select a date, then a time
BookingPage.selectDateOnCalendar: Select a date on the calendar
BookingPage.noAvailableTimesThisDay: No available times this day. Pick another date.
BookingPage.appointmentsPaused: Appointments are paused by the professional. Please check back later.

errors.validPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.selectVisitType: Please select a type of visit.
errors.timeSlotJustBooked: This time slot has just been booked. Please choose another slot.

DoctorProfilePage.whatToExpectBody: Book in seconds. Your appointment is instantly synced with the professional's agenda. You'll receive a confirmation email with a one-click WhatsApp link to contact the clinic and a direct button to add the date to your calendar.

Hero.title:
Stop chasing appointments.
Start focusing on patients.
Hero.subtitle: The professional booking link that connects you and your patients instantly. Local, automated, and built for Cyprus's independent practices and clinics.

Features.heading: Why DocCy?
Features.syncDesc: Google Calendar & Apple iOS integration. See your schedule on any device, always up to date.
Features.confirmDesc: Automatic email confirmations for you and your patient the second a booking is made. No more manual tracking.
Features.profileDesc: A fast, mobile-first booking experience. Your personal booking link is ready to be shared on WhatsApp or Social Media.

Showcase.title: See how DocCy transforms your practice

profile.title: The Digital Front Door (Public Profile)
profile.body: Your verified professional profile, in your patient's language.

calendar.title: The Smart Calendar
calendar.body: Patients book in seconds from your visual time grid.

confirmation.title: Instant Confirmation
confirmation.body: Zero friction. Appointment confirmed and emails sent automatically.

sync.title: Total Sync
sync.body: Then it's added to your Google Calendar, matching your language.

agenda.title: Your Control Panel (Doctor Agenda)
agenda.body: See your full week at a glance. Goodbye paper.

Pricing.title: Special launch pricing for the first 100 practitioners across Cyprus
Pricing.why90Desc: We want you to test DocCy through a full business quarter, including holidays and seasonal shifts. It gives enough real-world data to judge impact on your practice with confidence.
Pricing.limited: Limited Availability: <spots>{count}</spots> spots remaining out of 100
Pricing.foundersUnavailable: Founders Club offer is no longer available. Standard pricing is now active.
Pricing.noCard: No credit card required to start your free trial. Lifetime €19 pricing is locked in upon signup.
